message:
test(web): add hook tests with real API fixtures (mockMode=false)

Add deterministic API fixture tests for useSnapshot, useSafetyPosture,
and useVelocity hooks. Validates SystemSnapshot, SafetyPostureResponse,
and velocity response shapes against real API contracts rather than
mock data paths. Covers healthy, degraded, and error scenarios.

35 tests, 232 assertions.

Closes bd-1vr1.8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
